narrative:
Miami Twp I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 470 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.6 percentage points.
